# SoFi RFP Response

## Overview

This document is created by [Anchor AI](https://getanchor.ai/)

<img src="data:image/png;base64," width="491" height="266" />

## Scalability & Performance

1. How does your product handle ingesting and processing a large number of logs per second (100TB / 7M events daily)? Is there a threshold of input you’d consider unreasonable / would not scale? Are there any per day account limits for data ingestion?

2. How soon is log data queryable after ingestion?

3. What are your p50, p90, p99 search latency times for 30, 60 and 90 days of logs? Provide examples based on different data scales.

4. Please elaborate on how your product supports full-text search, aggregation, filtering, specifying time ranges, and regular expressions? Do any of these methods introduce latency into search times?

## Support Services

* Please provide an overview of your customer support model, inclusive of the following:

  * Current SLA to notify customers of impactful issues.

  * Incident prioritization response model (e.g., P1, P2, etc.) with associated response time guarantees.

  * The option of having a dedicated technical support engineer(s).

## User Experience

| Question | Answer |
| --- | --- |
| Detail tools and features to "drill down" in dashboards/events to add context in troubleshooting or debugging issues. |  |
| How does your query language compare to other vendor’s query language? Why is it different? Why is it better? |  |
| How many concurrent users, making use of logs (searching, dashboards, metrics, etc), can your platform handle? |  |
| How does your product support multi-tenancy and fine grained access controls (RBAC) as it applies to data and user experience? |  |
